description_long: This security guard is depicted as a tall, upright human figure dressed in a formal uniform. The uniform consists of a dark jacket, matching pants, and a peaked cap, all of which are standard for professional security personnel. The figure's posture is alert and authoritative, with arms positioned at the sides and feet slightly apart, suggesting readiness and vigilance. The uniform appears to be made of sturdy, dark-colored fabric, with metallic accents possibly representing buttons or insignia. No visible badge or security insignia can be seen on the chest, sleeves, or hat. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and suitable for urban environments such as building entrances, parking lots, or public events.
description: A tall, upright security guard in a formal dark uniform with a peaked cap, standing in an alert and professional posture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated profile of the security guard, highlighting the straight posture and the length of the uniform.
description_view_1: Rear angled view revealing the back of the uniform and the peaked cap, with arms visible at the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the slim silhouette and the clean lines of the uniform.
description_view_3: Front angled view displaying the chest, cap, and overall stance, with both arms and the front of the uniform visible.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal, standardized uniform consisting of a dark jacket, matching pants, and a peaked cap, all in black or dark blue, with metallic accents and no visible tie or shirt variation.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms at the sides and feet slightly apart, projecting an alert and authoritative demeanor.
